channel.title: NPR Topics: Religion
channel.description: NPR's stories on U.S. and world religion, spirituality, ethics, and moral issues affecting society and culture. Subscribe to NPR Religion RSS feeds.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: In a toss-up congressional district, Catholics reflect on Trump's pope comments
item.description: Parishioners in Levittown, Pa., react to President Trump's dispute with Pope Leo, which could have consequences in this toss-up congressional district.
item.content:encoded: Parishioners in Levittown, Pa., react to President Trump's dispute with Pope Leo, which could have consequences in this toss-up congressional district.
item.dc:creator: Carmen Russell-Sluchansky

item.title: Tensions with Trump continue to follow the pope as he continues his Africa tour
item.description: As Pope Leo continues his 11-day tour of Africa, the visit is being overshadowed by tensions with Washington.
item.content:encoded: As Pope Leo continues his 11-day tour of Africa, the visit is being overshadowed by tensions with Washington.
item.dc:creator: Emmanuel Akinwotu

item.title: Alabama parishioners share their thoughts on Trump's criticisms of the pope
item.description: Catholic churchgoers in Birmingham, Alabama, react to the tensions between President Trump and Pope Leo.
item.content:encoded: Catholic churchgoers in Birmingham, Alabama, react to the tensions between President Trump and Pope Leo.
item.dc:creator: Vahini Shori

item.title: Catholics in Chicago react to Trump and Vance's comments on Pope Leo
item.description: Chicago Catholics are reacting to the very public spat last week between President Trump and Chicago-born Pope Leo XIV. The pontiff has been critical of the war in Iran.
item.content:encoded: Chicago Catholics are reacting to the very public spat last week between President Trump and Chicago-born Pope Leo XIV. The pontiff has been critical of the war in Iran.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Pupovac

item.title: Tensions between President Trump and Pope Leo put American Catholics in awkward spot
item.description: The divide between the White House and the Vatican is widening after President Trump sharply criticized Pope Leo and the leader of the Catholic Church said he doesn't fear Trump.
item.content:encoded: The divide between the White House and the Vatican is widening after President Trump sharply criticized Pope Leo and the leader of the Catholic Church said he doesn't fear Trump.
item.dc:creator: Jack Morgan

item.title: Pope Leo vs. The Trump Administration
item.description: Pope Leo speaks out again about war and peace in a back and forth with President Trump, while the U.S. House speaker and vice president appear to question Leo's understanding of Catholic theology.
item.content:encoded: Pope Leo speaks out again about war and peace in a back and forth with President Trump, while the U.S. House speaker and vice president appear to question Leo's understanding of Catholic theology.
item.dc:creator: Jason DeRose

item.title: Pope Leo takes aim at 'handful of tyrants' spending billions on war amid tensions with Trump
item.description: Pope Leo XIV condemns "tyrants" fueling war with billions. His calls for global peace during his Africa trip come amid rising tensions with President Trump.
item.content:encoded:
Pope Leo XIV condemns "tyrants" fueling war with billions. His calls for global peace during his Africa trip come amid rising tensions with President Trump.

(Image credit: Andrew Medichini)
item.dc:creator: Emmanuel Akinwotu

item.title: Popes have spoken out on politics before. But with Trump and Pope Leo it's different
item.description: President Trump's attacks on Pope Leo are unprecedented, religious experts told NPR. Here's how the situation differs from other popes' political critiques.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump's attacks on Pope Leo are unprecedented, religious experts told NPR. Here's how the situation differs from other popes' political critiques.

(Image credit: Alberto Pizzoli)
item.dc:creator: Ava Berger

item.title: Pope heads to Cameroon as separatists announce 3-day pause in fighting
item.description: Pope Leo XIV is heading to the central African nation of Cameroon with a message of peace for its separatist region and for talks with President Paul Biya.
item.content:encoded:
Pope Leo XIV is heading to the central African nation of Cameroon with a message of peace for its separatist region and for talks with President Paul Biya.

(Image credit: Andrew Medichini)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Jesuit priest shares how Catholics are reacting to Trump's criticism of Pope Leo
item.description: NPR speaks with Father James Martin, a Jesuit priest and author, about how Catholics are reacting to President Trump's recent criticism of Pope Leo.
item.content:encoded: NPR speaks with Father James Martin, a Jesuit priest and author, about how Catholics are reacting to President Trump's recent criticism of Pope Leo.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez
